title: pelargonium × russelianum
intro: Pelargonium × russelianum, also known as Rosy Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rosy Geranium include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing stress. Rosy Geranium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
